evidence_rows.reading: V1.9 opened lawfully as a bounded re-review phase, not as a promotion phase.
The new breadth evidence is now explicitly reflected in refreshed promotion-judgment shortfalls.

interpretation: V1.9 has refreshed the breadth-target promotion judgment without crossing into promotion or integration.
The phase now has a clear bounded outcome: one feature improved materially, one only partially, and neither is promotion-ready.
The next legal step is a closure check, not retained-feature promotion or new collection inside this phase.
